detail.description:
On April 22, the Spring Update “Everflowing Glow” goes live in Ninja Must Die!

New Fire Element Cooperative Ninja: [Lucia] debuts!
Clear the field with sweeping damage, stun enemies, and help your main Ninja lock onto bosses!
Finish off bosses with a spectacular fireworks display, dealing devastating damage!
Lucia’s new skin [Lucia - Heartflutter Tales] will also be available at a discount on April 22!
Experience the “heartbeat” moments together with Lucia!

Koi’s second Exclusive Weapon: Fire

eventMentions.text: after realizing that you cannot get everything you need or want such as relics i became extremely di
i played for ~2 years. typical game mode: run map with ninja, choose cards, kill boss, run 2nd part
used to be good but gacha is rigged. there was a point where i was addicted to this game but poor dr
id give it a 5 if only my old favorite character was playable, unless it becomes a future update to
這遊戲抽卡有夠坑，衛鯉池我出了3金都歪，太雖的話基本上新角都要抽到大保底才能抽到，而且勾玉跟抽數也很難拿到，自從洛清出了之後就沒再抽到過新角色了，都是出金歪角，不課金想累積抽數抽新角基本上要等很久。還
